nodes.label: Negasva
nodes.rationale: Portrait Illustration Service platform built with Next.js 14 and Supabase.

nodes.label: Wizard Flow
nodes.rationale: 6-step ordering process: Style -> Body -> Background -> People -> Details -> Images.

nodes.label: Foundation Phase
nodes.rationale: Initial setup including DB schema, types, and state management.

nodes.label: Portrait Styles
nodes.rationale: Supported styles: Rick & Morty, Gravity Falls, Simpsons, Fairly OddParents.

nodes.label: Wizard State Management
nodes.rationale: Zustand store with localStorage persistence for the 6-step flow.

nodes.label: Stripe Integration
nodes.rationale: Planned Payment Phase integration for handling USD transactions.

nodes.label: Supabase Backend
nodes.rationale: Using Supabase for Auth, PostgreSQL (9 tables), and Storage.
